| Reader | Start | Then |
| --- | --- | --- |

| Advanced engineer | [Architecture](ARCHITECTURE.md) | [Proof objects](PROOF_OBJECTS.md), [Workflow autopilot](WORKFLOW_AUTOPILOT.md) |
